summary: American company Talon Avionics has unveiled the SECTR autonomous system, which uses AI algorithms for acoustic target tracking to passively detect small UAVs via microphone arrays. The Rubicon Center has published over 23,000 episodes of enemy target destruction, with 36.4% being unmanned systems, 16.9% communication and observation equipment, and 15.5% protected ground targets. In the Sumy region, the Sever assault group destroyed enemy 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled artillery units using FPV "KVN" drone strikes. Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka direction, specifically the 36th Marine Brigade, survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with video showing a drone detector being used at 0:11 to identify the threat.
